name: Jimmi
overview: In politically unstable Bangladesh, a simple yet determined woman’s life takes a drastic turn when she discovers a large sum of money by chance and decides to keep it, unknowingly entangling herself in a web of corruption which unravels when the fortune gets lost!

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Jimmi (জিম্মি) | Jaya Ahsan | Ashfaque Nipun | 28 MAR | hoichoi
